title: Nerfs Simple Footpaths
description:
A simple mod adding footpaths to boost your movement speed.
Textures are meant to have a vanilla-style feeling to them.
body:
A simple mod adding footpaths made from normal materials to fit with any build.

Current path variants:  
- Dirt  
- Grass  
- Gravel  
- Stone  
- Cobblestone  
- Oak Planks  

Future path variants:  
- Remaining wood types  
- Stone Bricks/Smooth Stone  
- Nether Bricks  
- Sand/Sandstone + Red versions  
- TBD  
  
Known Issues:  
- Paths do not drop themselves when broken  
- Stone paths do not require pickaxes  
- Textures are not technically final, but if people like them then they stay  

Feel free to suggest other path materials, and I hope these make your bases that little bit easier to traverse!

(P.S. I haven't tested it yet, but these blocks probably make great Minecolonies roads.)
